title: Dialing 2024
html:
3am New Year's Eve manifesto setting 2024 as a "massive, formative year." Yahir hammers do a good present as the central axis, then enumerates concrete dials: unconditional self-belief, manufactured adversity, deep work practice, building something dope, being a tanjiro-style empathetic person, dialing in the body, and the open question of love.

TL;DR

  • do a good present is named as the only thing that matters — vision is downstream of present action.
  • "Artificial adversity situations" surface as the design requirement for sustainable drive (vs. bursty emotional motivation).
  • Deep work commitments: 7-8am wake, 2+ contiguous hours, zero distractions — early articulation of what becomes deep work discipline.
  • "Build something dope" with smart people on board — the year-zero of every brotein / phib arc that follows.
  • tanjiro is named as the empathy template (Demon Slayer protagonist) — engage even when hurting; the inner flame motif is implicit.

Key quote

"We must do a good present, nothing else matters."

Why it matters in the graph

This is the load-bearing 2024 manifesto. Almost every "Thoughts and Things" entry from 2024 is a check-in against these dials. do a good present becomes the recurring frame across the year.

Open questions

  • Did the deep-work 7-8am routine actually stick?
  • Which "something dope" got built — bromenu? brotein? phib relaunch?

do a good present · you vs you · deep work · tanjiro · artificial adversity · 2024 · finding love
